visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco warehouse aisle, each holding a large, plush mahjong tile pillow. The woman on the left wears a purple sweater and a patterned bucket hat; the woman on the right wears a black top. The pillows are white and fluffy with large green and red characters. The background shows tall warehouse shelves stocked with bulk items and a few distant shoppers. Lighting is bright and even. (2) The women rotate the pillows to show the side and back. The woman on the left points to the green fabric on the side of her 'Eight Million' pillow. They smile and look at the camera, then at each other. A person in a grey hoodie walks by in the background. (3) The women bring the pillows close together and look directly at the camera with joyful expressions. The text overlays continue to appear, emphasizing the price and the product. The environment remains a busy retail warehouse with visible store aisles.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 喜歡打麻將的朋友不要錯過. [Variety]: 過年必備 589元. (2) [Subtitle]: 麻將抱枕 那麼大一個 跟嬰兒一樣大. (3) [Subtitle]: 589元 這個可以 打麻將時候偷偷給. (4) [Subtitle]: 八萬! 偷偷暗示一下. [Variety]: 八萬!. (5) [Subtitle]: 可是只有兩個圖案 八萬跟發. (6) [Subtitle]: 然後它超厚的 深綠色也蠻好看. (7) [Subtitle]: 那可能會有點粘毛 抱起來觸感很好 很溫暖.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 passers-by visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman in a purple sweater and fuzzy patterned hat, another in a black top with dark hair.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco wholesale warehouse interior with high ceilings, tall metal racks filled with assorted merchandise, and other shoppers in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice begins speaking in Mandarin with a friendly and excited tone. Upbeat, fast-tempo pop BGM starts simultaneously. Occasional soft thuds as the pillows are handled. (2) Vocal pitch remains high and expressive. A cartoonish 'ding' SFX occurs as a price tag overlay appears. The music maintains a steady, rhythmic beat with synth and electronic drum elements. (3) Another speaker joins briefly, laughing slightly. The primary speaker's volume increases as she shouts 'Eight Million!'. A stylized popping sound effect accompanies the visual text transition. (4) Speech rate is fast and enthusiastic. BGM continues at a consistent volume. Background ambient noise of a busy warehouse store is faintly audible but well below the signal level. (5) Vocal delivery becomes slightly more descriptive and informative regarding the textures. A final upbeat musical flourish as the video ends abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Demonstration -> Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and showcase oversized mahjong-themed plush pillows available at Costco. It uses enthusiastic narration and visual close-ups to highlight the product's novelty, size, price, and texture, targeting consumers looking for unique home decor or Chinese New Year themed items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of the product, price, and store location (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video's high energy and mahjong theme suggest it is likely targeted toward a Chinese-speaking audience during a holiday season.
